roadmap.milestone_count_rationale: 3 milestones: Aarav is a senior engineer with 6 years of experience. The gap is specific to advanced system design, distributed systems, and cloud architecture, which are critical for a senior backend role. Three focused milestones allow for deep dives into these areas without unnecessary breadth, aligning with his high urgency and 7 hours/week availability. This provides a clear, accelerated path to his target identity.

vision_profile.current_state: A Backend Engineer proficient in Java and Spring Boot, capable of executing assigned tasks efficiently.
vision_profile.main_blocker: Lack of deep system design, distributed systems, and cloud architecture knowledge to confidently lead and make architectural decisions.
vision_profile.top_motivation: To transition from executing tickets to owning and driving larger engineering decisions and architectural strategy.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: Can design robust, scalable backend services, apply advanced API design principles, and lead technical discussions with well-structured design documentation.
milestones.module_count_rationale: 4 modules because this milestone spans foundational system design, advanced API practices, concurrency management, and critical technical documentation skills required for a senior architect.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming the architect who designs the backbone of complex applications, moving beyond implementation to strategic system thinking.

project.title: Scalable URL Shortener Service Design & Implementation
project.description: Design a highly available and scalable URL shortening service, including API design, database schema, and a distributed ID generation system. Implement a core service with a REST API using Java/Spring Boot.
project.deliverable: High-Level Design (HLD) document, detailed API specification, core service implementation (Java/Spring Boot), and comprehensive unit/integration tests.
seeded_errors: The distributed ID generation system has a subtle race condition causing occasional duplicate short codes under high concurrent load.

modules.title: Foundations of System Design
modules.skill_count_rationale: 4 skills to cover the essential initial steps of system design, from understanding requirements to making high-level architectural choices.

skills.title: Advanced Requirements Gathering & Analysis
lessons: Use Cases & User Stories for System Design

scenario.title: Resolving Ambiguous Requirements in a Payment Gateway Design

science.desc: A critical third-party API dependency for your service suddenly announces deprecation with a 3-month notice. You must propose a migration strategy, considering impact on existing clients, data consistency, and minimal downtime.

modules.title: API Design & Service Layer
modules.skill_count_rationale: 4 skills to cover the breadth of modern API design, from REST best practices to advanced patterns like event-driven APIs.

modules.title: Concurrency & Multithreading
modules.skill_count_rationale: 4 skills to cover essential concurrency concepts and their practical application for building high-performance backend systems.

video.title: Ensuring Data Consistency in Concurrent Apps

science.desc: Design a highly concurrent caching layer for a popular e-commerce product catalog. Discuss thread safety, eviction policies, and how to handle cache stampedes.

modules.title: Technical Design Documentation & Review
modules.skill_count_rationale: 4 skills to equip you with the ability to effectively communicate and review complex technical designs, a hallmark of senior engineering.

video.title: From HLD to LLD: Implementation Ready Designs

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: Can design, implement, and troubleshoot complex distributed systems, ensuring high availability, fault tolerance, and data consistency, with expertise in messaging queues like Kafka.
milestones.module_count_rationale: 4 modules to provide a comprehensive understanding of distributed systems, covering core concepts, messaging with Kafka, scalability, and robust observability practices.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming the expert who tames the complexity of distributed systems, ensuring they are resilient, scalable, and performant.

project.title: Event-Driven Order Processing System with Kafka
project.description: Design and implement a microservices-based order processing system using Kafka for inter-service communication, ensuring eventual consistency and fault tolerance. Services include Order, Inventory, and Payment.
project.deliverable: Detailed architecture diagram, Kafka topic design, producer/consumer services (Java/Spring Boot), and a dashboard showing system health and message flow.
seeded_errors: A consumer group occasionally loses messages due to improper offset management during rebalancing, leading to inconsistent order statuses.

modules.title: Distributed Systems Fundamentals
modules.skill_count_rationale: 4 skills to establish a strong theoretical and practical foundation in the core challenges and solutions of distributed computing.

scenario.title: Designing for Consistency in a Global E-commerce Platform

skills.title: Consensus Algorithms (Paxos, Raft)
lessons: Use Cases for Consensus in Distributed Systems

science.desc: A critical background job processing financial transactions occasionally processes the same transaction twice due to network issues. You need to identify the root cause and implement an idempotent solution.

modules.title: Kafka Architecture & Patterns
modules.skill_count_rationale: 4 skills to provide a deep dive into Kafka's core components and advanced usage patterns, directly addressing a key skill gap.

skills.title: Kafka Core Concepts: Topics, Partitions, Brokers
Kafka Streams & KSQL for Real-time Processing

video.title: Processing Data in Motion with Kafka

skills.title: Schema Registry & Avro for Data Governance

modules.title: Scalability & Performance Engineering
modules.skill_count_rationale: 4 skills covering key strategies for scaling systems and optimizing their performance, crucial for handling high traffic and large datasets.

science.desc: You've identified a critical bottleneck in a high-traffic API endpoint. Describe your approach to diagnose, optimize, and validate the performance improvements, including tools and metrics you'd use.

modules.title: Reliability & Observability
modules.skill_count_rationale: 4 skills to cover the essential practices for building and maintaining reliable, observable distributed systems.

video.title: Keeping an Eye on Your Systems

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: Can architect, deploy, and manage highly available, secure, and cost-effective microservices on AWS, leading complex cloud-native initiatives and mentoring junior engineers.
milestones.module_count_rationale: 4 modules to cover the breadth of cloud-native architecture, AWS deployment, security best practices, and the leadership aspects expected of a senior engineer.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming the leader who designs and deploys robust, secure, and scalable cloud-native solutions, driving technical excellence and mentoring your team.

project.title: Migrating E-commerce Backend to AWS Microservices
project.description: Plan and partially implement the migration of a legacy e-commerce monolith into a set of independent microservices deployed on AWS, focusing on one critical service (e.g., product catalog). This includes designing the AWS architecture, containerizing the service, and defining CI/CD.
project.deliverable: Migration strategy document, detailed AWS architecture diagram, deployed product catalog microservice (Java/Spring Boot on ECS/Lambda), and CI/CD pipeline definition.
seeded_errors: The IAM roles for the deployed microservice are overly permissive, granting unnecessary access to other AWS resources, creating a security vulnerability.

modules.title: Microservices Architecture & Deployment
modules.skill_count_rationale: 4 skills to cover the advanced architectural patterns and deployment considerations for microservices, including containerization and serverless.

skills.title: Service Discovery & API Gateways
lessons: Implementing with Spring Cloud Gateway/Netflix Zuul

scenario.title: Diagnosing Latency Spikes in an API Gateway with High Traffic

skills.title: Domain-Driven Design for Microservices
lessons: Strategic Design: Bounded Contexts & Context Maps
Tactical Design: Aggregates, Entities, Value Objects
Refactoring Monoliths to Microservices with DDD

science.desc: A new feature requires real-time data processing, but the existing monolithic database is a bottleneck. You need to propose a microservice architecture using AWS Lambda and DynamoDB, outlining the data migration and integration strategy.

modules.title: AWS Deployment Patterns & Services
modules.skill_count_rationale: 5 skills to provide practical expertise in deploying and managing backend services on AWS, covering compute, data, and infrastructure as code.

skills.title: EC2, ECS/EKS for Microservices Deployment
lessons: Choosing the Right AWS Compute Service
Introduction to EKS for Kubernetes on AWS

skills.title: AWS Lambda & API Gateway for Serverless Backends
lessons: Building REST APIs with API Gateway & Lambda
Lambda Integrations with Other AWS Services

skills.title: RDS & DynamoDB for Scalable Data Storage
lessons: Choosing Relational vs. NoSQL on AWS

modules.title: Security in Distributed Systems
modules.skill_count_rationale: 4 skills to cover critical security aspects in distributed systems, from authentication to data protection and API security.

skills.title: API Security (Rate Limiting, WAF, DDoS Protection)
Data Encryption (at rest/in transit) & Secure Communication
IAM Best Practices & Principle of Least Privilege

science.desc: A security audit reveals that your microservices have overly permissive IAM roles. Explain how you would identify the necessary permissions for each service and implement the principle of least privilege without disrupting production.

modules.title: System Design Case Studies & Leadership
modules.skill_count_rationale: 4 skills to culminate the learning journey by applying knowledge to real-world scenarios and developing leadership capabilities.

skills.title: Analyzing Large Scale Systems (Netflix, Uber, etc.)
lessons: Identifying Key Design Principles in Practice

skills.title: Mentoring & Advanced Code Review
lessons: Effective Mentoring Strategies for Junior Engineers
Fostering a Culture of Technical Excellence

skills.title: Strategic Technology Adoption & Innovation
lessons: Balancing Technical Debt & New Feature Development
